mcps.name: Solana Developer MCP (Official)
mcps.description: Official Solana Developer MCP serving up-to-date documentation, account queries, transaction analysis, and CPI generation
mcps.setup_command: claude mcp add --transport http solana-mcp-server https://mcp.solana.com/mcp

mcps.name: Solana Dev MCP (Foundation Demo)
mcps.description: Solana Foundation demo MCP showcasing basic Solana RPC methods like getBalance, getAccountInfo, getTransaction
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/solana-foundation/solana-dev-mcp && cd solana-dev-mcp && npm install && npm run build

mcps.name: Solana Agent Kit MCP
mcps.description: MCP server powered by the Solana Agent Kit with comprehensive onchain tools for AI agents — deploy tokens, trade, mint NFTs, transfer
mcps.setup_command: npm install -g solana-mcp

mcps.name: Solana Agent Kit Adapter MCP
mcps.description: Official MCP adapter for the Solana Agent Kit framework — 60+ actions including trading, lending, staking, NFTs, perps, cross-chain
mcps.setup_command: npm install @solana-agent-kit/adapter-mcp

mcps.name: Helius MCP (Official)
mcps.description: Official Helius AI tooling — 60+ tools across 10 domains for querying Solana, sending transactions, managing webhooks, wallet analysis
mcps.setup_command: claude mcp add helius npx helius-mcp@latest

mcps.name: openSVM Solana MCP Server
mcps.description: Comprehensive MCP server implementing 73+ Solana RPC methods with stdio and web modes, multi-SVM-network support
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/openSVM/solana-mcp-server && cd solana-mcp-server && npm install && npm run build

mcps.name: Chainstack RPC Nodes MCP
mcps.description: Fast extensible MCP server for JSON-RPC blockchain nodes — supports EVM and Solana for real-time interactions and program calls
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/chainstacklabs/rpc-nodes-mcp && cd rpc-nodes-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: QuickNode MCP
mcps.description: MCP server wrapping QuickNode Admin API — lets AI agents provision and manage QuickNode blockchain infrastructure
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/quiknode-labs/qn-guide-examples && cd qn-guide-examples/AI/solana-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Jupiter MCP (dcSpark)
mcps.description: MCP server for Jupiter swap API — quote retrieval, transaction building, and execution on Solana DEX
mcps.setup_command: npx @mcp-dockmaster/mcp-server-jupiter

mcps.name: Jupiter MCP (Full-Featured)
mcps.description: Full-featured Jupiter MCP with Ultra API (swaps), Trigger API (limit orders), token search, portfolio management, Shield security
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/araa47/jupiter-mcp && cd jupiter-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Solana Limit Order MCP
mcps.description: Place limit orders on Solana via Jupiter — set limit buy/sell orders, view open/historical orders, cancel orders
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/dimitrov-d/solana-limit-order-mcp && cd solana-limit-order-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Orca DEX MCP
mcps.description: Comprehensive tools for Orca DEX on Solana and Eclipse — token swaps, liquidity operations, pool analytics
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/demcp/demcp-orca-mcp && cd demcp-orca-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Marinade Finance MCP
mcps.description: Marinade Finance MCP for liquid staking — stake/unstake, mSOL balance, transfers, protocol state queries, docs search
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/leandrogavidia/marinade-finance-mcp-server && cd marinade-finance-mcp-server && npm install

mcps.name: Solentic (Blueprint Staking)
mcps.description: Native Solana staking infrastructure for AI agents — 18 MCP tools, 21 REST endpoints, 13 A2A skills
mcps.setup_command: claude mcp add --transport http solentic https://solentic.theblueprint.xyz/mcp

mcps.name: DFlow Prediction Markets MCP
mcps.description: Unified spot + prediction market trading on Solana via DFlow — trade Kalshi markets with smart routing, events, forecasts
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/openSVM/dflow-mcp && cd dflow-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Metaplex Genesis MCP
mcps.description: Interact with Metaplex Genesis program — fetch accounts, query bonding curves, get swap quotes
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/maikershq/metaplex-genesis-mcp && cd metaplex-genesis-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Phantom Wallet MCP (Official)
mcps.description: Official Phantom MCP — embedded wallet access, sign/send transactions, token swaps, transfers across Solana and EVM chains
mcps.setup_command: npm install @phantom/mcp-server

mcps.name: Privy MCP Server
mcps.description: Privy.io MCP for user management, wallet operations, blockchain interactions across Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/incentivai-io/privy-mcp-server && cd privy-mcp-server && npm install

mcps.name: WalletMCP
mcps.description: Simple MCP for Solana wallets — retrieve transactions, SOL balances, program logs, close BPF buffers, send SOL
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/paulfruitful/WalletMCP && cd WalletMCP && npm install

mcps.name: Meme Token Deployer MCP
mcps.description: Deploy instantly tradable tokens on Solana at zero cost through Claude Desktop conversation
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/kirabuilds/mcp-meme-deployer && cd mcp-meme-deployer && npm install

mcps.name: Memecoin Observatory MCP
mcps.description: Analyze memecoins with real-time radar, social signal analysis, whale wallet tracking, cultural analysis, on-chain data
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/tony-42069/solana-mcp && cd solana-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Quant72 Trading MCP
mcps.description: On-chain quantitative trading expert with multiple market data sources and all Solana Agent Kit operations
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/Quant72AI/quant72-mcp && cd quant72-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Rug Check MCP
mcps.description: Detect potential risks in Solana meme tokens — helps AI agents avoid rug pulls and unsafe projects
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/kukapay/rug-check-mcp && cd rug-check-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: AetherCore Token Rug Check
mcps.description: Three-layer safety audit — machine verdict, LLM analysis, raw on-chain evidence via RugCheck.xyz, DexScreener, GoPlus
mcps.setup_command: npx mcp-remote https://rugcheck.aethercore.dev

mcps.name: Solana Fender (Anchor Security)
mcps.description: Security analysis for Solana Anchor programs — static analysis checking smart contracts against known vulnerability patterns
mcps.setup_command: cargo install anchor-mcp && anchor-mcp --mcp

mcps.name: Cryptoleek Solana RugCheck
mcps.description: RugCheck scam detection + TransactionHelper for fetching/filtering transaction history, plus core Solana tools
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/cryptoleek-team/awesome-solana-mcp && cd awesome-solana-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: DexScreener MCP (openSVM)
mcps.description: Real-time DEX pair data, token information, market statistics across multiple blockchains (best on Solana)
mcps.setup_command: npx -y @opensvm/dexscreener-mcp-server

mcps.name: Spice (Flipside Analytics)
mcps.description: Query Solana blockchain data via Flipside API — fetch catalog metadata and run Flipside analytics queries
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/getnimbus/spice && cd spice && npm install

mcps.name: Hubble AI MCP (Visualization)
mcps.description: Analyze and visualize PumpFun/DEX transactions via natural language — generates bar, line, pie, radar charts
mcps.setup_command: npx hubble-ai-mcp

mcps.name: Solana Forum Summarizer MCP
mcps.description: Browse and summarize the Solana Forum — latest/popular posts, group by category/author, search by keyword
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/dimitrov-d/solana-forum-summarizer-mcp && cd solana-forum-summarizer-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Anchor MCP (Security CLI)
mcps.description: MCP CLI server template for Anchor programs — expose security checks and Anchor-specific tools to LLMs
mcps.setup_command: cargo install anchor-mcp

mcps.name: Solana Web3.js MCP Server
mcps.description: Enable AI assistants to develop and deploy Solana smart contracts end-to-end using web3.js
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/FrankGenGo/solana-web3js-mcp-server && cd solana-web3js-mcp-server && npm install

mcps.name: assetCLI
mcps.description: Goldman Sachs for AI Agents — bonding curves, DEX integrations, DAO creation, treasury management, governance
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/assetCLI/assetCLI-init && cd assetCLI-init && npm install

mcps.name: GOAT SDK MCP
mcps.description: The largest agentic finance toolkit — 200+ integrations, MCP server supporting EVM and Solana chains
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/goat-sdk/goat && cd goat && npm install && npm run build

mcps.name: Hummingbot MCP
mcps.description: Control Hummingbot for automated crypto trading — portfolio balances, order management, Orca/Jupiter/Raydium DEX connectors
mcps.setup_command: docker pull hummingbot/mcp

mcps.name: ChainGuard (Crime Detection)
mcps.description: AI-powered real-time blockchain crime detection across Bitcoin, Ethereum, Hedera, and Solana — ML-powered pattern detection
mcps.setup_command: npx mcp-remote https://chainguard-mcp-server.ndivij2004.workers.dev/mcp

mcps.name: SolMail MCP
mcps.description: Send physical mail to 200+ countries using Solana for payment — letters, postcards at ~$1.50 / 0.015 SOL
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/ExpertVagabond/solmail-mcp && cd solmail-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: openSVM Agent & MCP Registry
mcps.description: On-chain registry for autonomous AI agents and MCP servers on Solana — agent and tool/resource/prompt discovery
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/openSVM/aeamcp && cd aeamcp && npm install

mcps.name: Aldrin Labs Solana MCP
mcps.description: 21 core Solana RPC methods — account ops, token management, staking
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/Aldrin-labs/solana-mcp-server.git

mcps.name: AMOCA Wallet Analytics MCP
mcps.description: Specialized wallet analysis — token balances, portfolio valuation, transaction history
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/manolaz/amoca-solana-mcp-server.git

mcps.name: SolMCP
mcps.description: Python MCP with Helius, DexScreener, and Pyth oracle integration for validators
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/N-45div/SolMCP-Solana-MCP-Server.git

mcps.name: Solana DeFi Analytics MCP
mcps.description: Wallet analytics, transaction monitoring, and DeFi strategy optimization
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/kirtiraj22/Solana-DeFi-Analytics-MCP-Server.git

mcps.name: Solana Wallet Security Scanner
mcps.description: Scan wallets for threats and detect suspicious programs on Solana
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/mohitparmar1/Solana-Wallet-Security-Scanner.git

mcps.name: Solana MCP (Cloudflare)
mcps.description: Solana MCP server deployed on Cloudflare Workers for edge execution
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/sendaifun/solana-mcp-cloudflare.git

mcps.name: SendAI DevRel MCP
mcps.description: Developer relations MCP server by SendAI
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/sendaifun/devrel-mcp.git

mcps.name: x402 MCP
mcps.description: x402 payment protocol MCP server for micropayment-gated AI operations
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/sendaifun/x402-mcp.git

mcps.name: Flash Trade MCP
mcps.description: Perpetual DEX tooling for Flash Trade on Solana — leveraged long/short positions across SOL, BTC, ETH with Pyth Lazer prices, non-custodial
mcps.setup_command: npx flash-trade-mcp

mcps.name: Solscan MCP
mcps.description: Query Solana transactions, token info, and account activities via Solscan Pro API — Rust-based MCP for blockchain forensics and analytics
mcps.setup_command: cargo install solscan-mcp

mcps.name: Perp CLI MCP (HypurrQuant)
mcps.description: Multi-DEX perpetual futures CLI + MCP server — Pacifica (Solana), Hyperliquid, Lighter. 18 tools for AI-powered perps trading
mcps.setup_command: npx -y -p perp-cli perp-mcp

mcps.name: Dexter MCP
mcps.description: 60+ Solana DeFi tools over HTTP and stdio — swaps, liquidity, lending, staking, and portfolio management in one MCP server
mcps.setup_command: git clone https://github.com/Dexter-DAO/dexter-mcp && cd dexter-mcp && npm install

mcps.name: Unclaimed SOL MCP
mcps.description: Scan and claim reclaimable SOL from dormant wallet accounts — close empty token accounts, burn dust, reclaim rent via AI assistants
mcps.setup_command: npx -y @unclaimed-sol/mcp
